steps.title: Set f of x equal to 88
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=8(2x+5)$. The question asks for the $x$-value when $f(x)=88$, so solve $$8(2x+5)=88$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The correct answer is $3$. It checks because $8(2(3)+5)=8(11)=88$. The other choices make $2x+5$ larger than $11$, so they make $f(x)$ larger than $88$. Therefore, A is correct.
